title: Squeedometer
description: In-game speedometer updated for the latest version of Minecraft
body:
This mod adds a configurable speedometer to your Minecraft HUD in either km/h or blocks/second. 

This is the one of many forks of the [original 1.12.2 Forge mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/squeedometer), but is as far as I am the only one who is actively maintaining the mod for modern versions of Minecraft for Fabric. 

## Configurable options

- Display of vertical speed
- Speed text can be coloured red or green (colours configurable) for deceleration and acceleration, respectively 
- Which corner of the screen to display speed
- Speed unit (km/h or blocks per second)
